Description:
Tech Specs

    Processor

    Intel® Core™ Ultra 7 256V (47 TOPS NPU, 8 cores, up to 4.8 GHz)
    Operating System
    (Dell Technologies recommends Windows 11 Pro for business)

    Windows 11 Pro, Copilot+ PC
    Graphics Card

    Intel® Arc™ Graphics
    Display

    14", Touch, 2K, WVA, 300 nits
    Memory

    16GB, LPDDR5X, 8533MT/s, Memory on Package, onboard
    Storage

    1 TB, M.2, PCIe NVMe, SSD
    Case

    Ice Blue, with Fingerprint Reader
    Microsoft Office

    Activate Your Microsoft 365 For A 30 Day Trial
    Home and Small Business Security Solutions

    McAfee Business Protection 1-year
    Hardware Support Services Upgrades

    Basic Onsite Service after remote diagnosis with Hardware-Only Support, 12 Month(s)
    Accidental Damage Service

    None
    Keyboard

    Ice Blue English Backlit Copilot Key Keyboard, No Numeric Keypad
    Ports

    1 USB 3.2 Gen 1  Type-A  (5 Gbps) 
    1 USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) Type-C® port with DisplayPort™ 1.4 and Power Delivery
    1 Thunderbolt™ 4 (40 Gbps) with DisplayPort™ 2.1 and Power Delivery
    1 HDMI 2.1 port
    1 Universal Audio jack
    Dimensions & Weight

    Height: 0.65 in. (16.39 mm)
    Width: 12.36 in. (314.00 mm)
    Depth: 8.90 in. (226.15 mm)
    Starting weight: 3.55 lb (1.61 kg)
    Touchpad

    Precision touchpad
    Camera

    1080p at 30 fps FHD camera, Dual-array microphones
    Audio and Speakers

    Stereo speakers with Waves MaxxAudio® Pro, 2.5W x 2 = 5W
    Chassis

    Exterior Chassis Materials:
    LCD Cover/Base: Aluminum
    Bezel/Palm-rest: Plastic

    Colour Options:
    Ice Blue

    Touchpad:
    Cloud: Precision mylar-touchpad
    Wireless

    Intel® Wi-Fi 7 BE201, 2x2, 802.11be, Bluetooth® wireless card
    Primary Battery

    4-Cell Battery, 64WHr (Integrated)
    Power

    65W Type-C Adapter
    Stylus

    Active Pen Not Included
Label: Dell 14 Plus 2in1 14" FHD+ Táctil, Ultra 7 256V, 16GB 8533mt, 1TB, 24Horas, Wifi7
